items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

items.title: WorkBench Revisited: Workplace Agents Two Years On
items.summary:

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

items.title: 1 in 4 World Cup Matches Could Be Played in Dangerous Temperatures
items.summary: A new report warns that Miami, Kansas City, Philadelphia, Dallas, and Houston could be particularly hot places to play during the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: A Crypto Scam Targeted a Gay OnlyFans Star. Then His X Feed Was Flooded With ‘MAGA Propaganda’
items.summary: In recent months hackers have attempted to extort money from porn stars with big followings, in some cases filling their feeds with pro-MAGA and crypto content.

items.summary: According to a new report from Semafor, the White House's decision to impose export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos was driven in part by fears that it had been accessed by a group linked to China. items.title: The US Government Is Letting a Key Data Center Regulation Expire
items.summary: The federal government is planning to let a rule regulating federal data center operations sunset in September with no replacement.

items.title: The UK Places a Sweeping Ban on Social Media for Kids Under 16
items.summary: The UK government is introducing a ban on social media for children and a minimum age for some chatbots in an attempt to shield young people from dangerous corners of the web.

items.title: Meta Tapped a Pentagon Supplier to Prototype Face Recognition for Its Glasses
items.summary: Rank One, whose board includes a former CIA deputy director and a former FBI science chief, supplied face recognition to Meta for internal development of its smart glasses app.

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
